name: io.github.skunkobi/leclerc-drive
description: Expose your E.Leclerc Drive as MCP tools via WebMCP — search products, manage cart, refresh natively, from any MCP client (opencode / Claude Code). Runs inside your logged-in Chrome tab; no cookie extraction.

packages.transportHint: This server is a WebMCP relay, not a classic stdio server. Configure your MCP client to launch `@mcp-b/webmcp-local-relay` with `--widget-origin` pinned to your Leclerc Drive origin, and load the bundled Chrome extension (dist/extension/) so it registers the tools in your tab. See the README for the exact opencode/Claude Code config block.
